subcodes.first_line: O thou who wanderest in the wilderness of the love of God! Though thou art beyond a hundred thousand mountains, plains and deserts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره بادیه محبت الله هر چند در پس صد هزار کوه و دشت و صحرا افتاده با وجود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
